# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.

Prevent linkerd no mtls.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: my-service-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-service
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: opaque
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: my-service-authz
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: Server
    name: my-service-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - kind: MeshTLS
      name: default
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: default
spec:
  identity:
    kind: ServiceAccount
    name: my-service-account
    namespace: default
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: my-service-account
  namespace: default
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: my-service
  namespace: default
  labels:
    app: my-service
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  containers:
    - name: my-service-container
      image: my-service-image:latest
      ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
